text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Fukuryu Stakes—the open
dirt race we chose to enter in place of the Satsuki
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Say, Trainer. I know we decided I wouldn't enter
the Satsuki Sho, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What do you think of the Japanese Derby for our
next race? You'd like me to enter it, right?
choice_data_list: Sure. It's a special race after all.
Sure. It's a special race after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Derby isn't a race that just anyone can freely
enter. And, aptitude aside, Copano Rickey is
capable of meeting the requirements.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If the timing works out right, I would like to
consider it, at the very least.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Got it! I'll race with that in mind!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The qi is really... faint. Both that of the racers
and the spectators...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Ah, that figures. Obviously, the intensity is much
lower than the Satsuki Sho.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The calm makes the situation difficult to read.
Even so, there's got to be something here to help
me decide whether dirt or turf is the way to go.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Silence. Yes, this silence is also the dragon's
voice. The dragon within the earth is trying to
relay something to me!)

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Even if I don't stand out now, if I keep doing my
best, someday people will notice and I can be
famous!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Turf really is the shining star of the racing world,
and I was stuck on that for ages.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I see. Could that be what it's all about?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: If my guess is right, the path I should take is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No... I'm still not sure. But, if I can prove myself in
this race...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The dragon will surely reveal its face and point
me in the direction of good fortune. All righty!
